reviews.review_description: I just love this story about two brothers and the world they live in. Fun to share with your friends and family. Children will love this. Very happy to add this to my VR collection. Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi Mushroomies

Thank you very much for your review :)

reviews.review_description:
I tried to refund it but it did not work 😡😡😡 and it’s super boring. It didn’t even save my progress and I accidentally bought it too.
so glad it was only like a few bucks

developer_response.body:
Hi BigChicken1234,

Thank you for giving Gravity VR a try. I'm sorry you didn't liked it. 

Please contact us at support@astreaimmersive.io so we can see why the refund didn't work. 

It would also really help us if you could explain to us why our experience didn't match your expectations. 

Thank you very much.

Best Regards,

Zoé
